NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF
OPPOSITION TO MTN TO COMPEL PRODUCTION OF WITNESS CHRISTINIA GIBBS STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ZANEV, PAVLIN H NACHEVA-ZANEV, TANYA

DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANT SANDRA FULLERTON'S MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFF TO COMPLY WITH DEMAND FOR INSPECTION TO PERMIT DEFENDANT'S EXPERTS TO TAKE VEHICLE FOR TEST RIDE. THE COURT FINDS THAT GOOD CAUSE HAS BEEN ESTABLISHED FOR THE ROAD TEST, THEREFORE, MOTION GRANTED, WITH THE CAVEAT THAT THE ROAD TEST MUST BE COMPLETED ON A PRIVATE DRIVEWAY OR IN A PRIVATE PARKING LOT IMMEDIATELY ADJACENT TO THE FACILITY WHERE THE SCOOTER IN QUESTION IS STORED, OR AT ANOTHER LOCATION MUTUALLY AGREED UPON BY THE PARTIES. UNLESS OTHERWISE AGREED, THE ROAD TEST SHALL BE COMPLETED NO LATER THAN DECEMBER 6, 2013 DUE TO THE RAPIDLY APPROACHING TRIAL DATE. THE COURT NOTES THAT WHILE PLAINTIFF RAISES A LEGITIMATE CONCERN ABOUT POTENTIAL INJURIES OR DAMAGE OCCURRING DURING THE TEST, DEFENDANT HAS PROVIDED LIABILITY AND INDEMNITY WAIVERS. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID MCDONALD, CLERK K. LIU, NOT REPORTED. (D302)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Production Of Witness Christina Gibbs' Statement To The Plaintiff
Off Calendar Nov-27-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, the court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT SANDRA FULLERTON's Motion To Compel Production Of Witness Christina Gibbs' Statement To The Plaintiff is Off calendar per moving party. Judge Pro Tem David McDonald, Clerk K. Liu, not reported. (D302)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiff To Comply With Demand For Inspection To Permit Defendant'S Experts To Take Vehicle For Test Ride
Off Calendar Nov-27-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, the court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT SANDRA FULLERTON's Motion To Compel Plaintiff To Comply With Demand For Inspection To Permit Defendant'S Experts To Take Vehicle For Test Ride. The Court finds that good cause has been established for the road test, therefore, motion granted, with the caveat that the road test must be completed on a private driveway or in a private parking lot immediately adjacent to the facility where the scooter in question is stored, or at another location mutually agreed upon by the parties. Unless otherwise agreed, the road test shall be completed no later than December 6, 2013 due to the rapidly approaching trial date. The Court notes that while Plaintiff raises a legitimate concern about potential injuries or damage occurring during the test, Defendant has provided liability and indemnity waivers. Prevailing party to prepare order. Judge Pro Tem David McDonald, Clerk K. Liu, not reported. (D302)

MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-29-2013 Text Ruling

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-25-2013 Set For Trial On Dec-16-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
